titleStmt.title: SII 18.141: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 141. (B.K. No. 70 of 1933-34.) NARAGUND (KASBA), NARAGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into a wall of the raṅgamaṇḍapa in the Śaṅkaraliṅga temple.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Bhūlōkamaīladēva is dated in the 13th year of his reign Kāḷayukta, Vaiśākha Pūrṇimā, Manday lunar eclipse. But for the week-day the details correspond to A.D. 1138, April 26, on which day there was a lunar eclipse. The week-day was, however, Tuesday, not Monday as cited in the record.

It records a gift of money made to god Dhavaḷa Śaṅkaradēva of the Mahāgrahāra Piriya-Naṟugunda, in the presence of the Two-hundred-and-twenty Mahājanas of the place. The gift was made by Rudradēva, nephew (or son-in-law) of Mahadēvarasa, the governor of Bēḷvala Three-hundred and Huligeṛe Three-hundred. Rudradēva was administering Koḷanūr Thirty, Beṇṇedaḍḍi Seventy and the bhattagāve villages in Beḷvala region. A grant of a village (name lost) made by Mahadēvarasa himself to the same god is also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . ©
jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnatadaṁṣṭrāgra viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
© svasti śrīpārvvatīlōcanakuvaḷayapīyūṣadhāmaṁ triḷōkīprastutyaṁ dēva dēvādhipanakhiḷajagatka ©
rt® gaṁgānadīphēnastōmaprāṁśumāḷāṁkitakapiḷajaṭājūṭanatyaṁtatējō vistāraṁ śaṁkaraṁ śāśvatasukha
niḷayaṁ kūrttu rakṣikke namma . dharaṇīcakramanāḷdanādinriparā cāḷukyaroḷu tailapaṁ sthirasatyā
śrayanudghavikramanripaṁ sandayyaṇaṁ śrīvadhūvaranantā jayasiṁhanuṁnataguṇaṁ traiḷō
kyamallaṁ dharādharadhairyyaṁ bhuvanaykanūrjjitayaśaṁ permmāḍibhūpāḷaka . Ā nripana sūnu saptāṁ
bhōnidhiparivṛtadharitriyaṁ taṁna bhujōddāniyoḷe tāḷdidaṁ lakṣmīniḷayaṁ ca krirājaṁ sarvvajñanripa . ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhūlōkamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōtta rābhi
vṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . caladiṁ bhūlōkamallakṣitipa
ti besasalu lāḷanaṁ cōḷanaṁ kēraḷanaṁ pāṁcāḷanaṁ gūrjjarananadhikanēpāḷanaṁ gollanaṁ siṁhaḷanaṁ kāśmīranaṁ māgadhananu
ṟade vikrāntadiṁdotti kappaṁgoḷaleṁdiṁtirppa sēnādhipanakhiḷaguṇāvāsanī kāḷi dāsa . Intenisida mahāpracaṁ
ḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ kāḷimarasara tanūbhavanātanēdoreyaneṁdoḍe . nijakhaḍgaṁ vīralakṣmī priyamu
khamukuraṁ tējamudyōtitāśāgajakuṁbhāḷaṁkritālēpitasurucirasiṁdūramuttuṁga
kīrttidhvajamākāśādhvagaṁgādhavaḷarucige śādriśyameṁdeṁde kūrttiṁtu jagaṁ vyāvarṇni salkoppuva
namama mahādēvadaṇḍādhinātha . Intenisida mahadēvarasaru beḷvala mūnūṟumaṁ hulige
ṟe mūnūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḷdarasugeyyuttamire . vri . pati
hitakāryyatatparate sāhasadēḷgevudāramārggadunnati puruśārtthadoḷpu nija dharmmada permme bhujapratā
padugrate caladurkku satyadaḻetaṁ vinayōktiyenippa sadguṇabratamivu paṭṭalūra mahadēvacamū
patigekkalāvaṇa . Ā mahadēvacamūpaśikhāmaṇigatimudadinaḷiyanesedaṁ lakṣmīdhāmaṁ
kauṁḍilyakuḷōddāmaṁ śrīrudradēvadaṁḍādhīśa . Ā vibhugādaṁ sōdarabhāvaṁ guṇamēru dhavaḷa
śankaradēvāṁghrivimaḷapadmabhriṁgaṁ sōvarasaṁ śubhrakīrttikāṁtāramaṇa . Intenisida rudra
dēvarasaru beḷvaladoḷeseva palavuṁ bhattagāvegaḷmaṁ koḷanūrmmūvattumaṁ beṇne daḍḍiyerppattumaṁ
svadharmmadiṁ rakṣisuttamire . saranidhimēkhaḷāvṛtavasuṁdhareyeṁba viḷāsinīmukhāṁ buruha
davolvirājisuva beḷvalanāḷke podaḷdu sōbhegāgaramene bhattagāve padineṁṭaṟoḷaṁ pari pūrṇnalakṣmi
yaṁ dhariyisidagrahārameseguṁ naṟuguṁdamiḷātaḷāgradoḷu . suraśaiḷakkeṇeya
ppa hēmagiriyaṁ dugdhābdhiyaṁ pōltaḷaṁkarisuttuṁ paripūrṇnamappa keṟeyiṁ kalpāva nījakke
māṁkarisuttaṁ karamoppuvāramegaḷiṁ traiḷōkyasanmūrtti śaṁkaranārāyaṇadēvariṁde naṟuguṁ
daṁ nāḍe kaṇgoppugu . Alli . dhavaḷīśāṁghṛdvayārādhakarasuraharaṁ vīranā rāya
ṇāṁghṛpravarāṁbhōjātabhriṁgarbbhagavatīvaralabdhaptasādartrayīśāstra vitarkkānēka kāvyō
paniṣadaviṣayajñānigaḷu brahmavaṁśōdbhavarinnūḻippadiṁbarssakaḷabudhasurōrvvījarā ditya
tējaru . Ā viprōttamaroḷage kaḷāvidaratyamaḷakīrttikāṁtādhiparurvvīvaṁdya ragra
pūjege tāvadhiparppēmagēriyayvattayvaru . © svasti yamaniyamasyādhyā yadhyā
nadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānapārāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpaṁnarappa śrīmanmahāgra
hāraṁ piriya naṟugundadaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa samakṣadoḷu śrīmaddhavaḷaśaṁkara dēvargge
śrīmaccāḷukyabhūlōkamalladēvavarṣada 13 neya kāḷayuktasaṁvatsarada vaitākha puRead śā.
ṇnami sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇaduttamatithiyoḷu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍa
nāyakaṁ mahadēvarasara besadi . v® . padedinnūḻeppadimbarnneredire dhavaḷēśange satpātradānapra
danappī rudradēvan pati besasida dharmōktiyiṁ pūrvvasiddhāyadoḷoldayvattu ponnam niyami
sida purāṇakke bhōgakkidatyāspadamācandrārkkatāraṁ sthirataranaḍegendartthiyim pūṇḍu bi
ṭṭam . śrīmanmahapracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ mahadēvarasaru beṇnedaḍiyerppattaṟoḷagaṇa [A]
haṭṭiyemba grāmamaṁ śrīmaddhavaḷaśankaradēvargge sarvvanamaśyamāgi dhārā
pūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭarintī dharmmamaṁ mēlāḷkeyarasugaḷuṁ manneyarum svadharmmadim pra
tipāḷisuvaru . svadattā paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ ya
sya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyō
nupālanaṁ dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 18.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
